note: Per-skill index: for each observed skill/ability, lists every talent that modifies it, where it sits in the tree, its parsed stat modification, and a mock value showing that modification applied to a normalized baseline of 10. Each modifying talent is tagged with one or more lanes from laneTaxonomy (DMG/CRIT/CDR/CAST/HASTE/SPEED/HEAL/SHIELD/MITIGATION/RESOURCE/COST/DURATION/AOE/CC/ARMOR/SUMMON/MISC), plus cross-cutting behavior flags (PROC, STACK) that describe how the effect triggers rather than what stat it touches. A handful of nodes have unresolved "$xx" template descriptions in the source export - these are flagged rather than guessed at.

modifyingTalents.description: Doubles the absorption of Black Shield while below 35% health.
Your Demon's Blood can now stack 5 additional times and each stack now increases the absorption amount of Black Shield by 1%.

Curse an enemy for 15 seconds, dealing 1575 + 100% AP Shadowflame Damage over 15 seconds.

Your next Shieldgore within 12 seconds grants you Black Shield, absorbing 860 + 200% Stamina damage for 30 seconds.

Brimstone Knight.baseDescription: Increases your Fire damage dealt by 3% and dealing Fire damage increases the enemy spell damage taken by 10% for 15 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage of Sever by 30% against Burning targets and it now increases the targets chance to be critically struck by 3% for 12 seconds.
Increases your critical damage against Burning targets by 40%.
Increases the critical strike chance and damage of Burning Blade by 30%.
Your Burning Blade now affects 4 additional attacks.

Burning Power.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your attack power by 100% of your Intellect and your spell damage by 50% of your Strength.

Burning Rage.baseDescription:
Enrage, generating 15 Rage every 1 sec and making you immune to incapacitate, banish, and polymorph effects for 6 seconds.

Usable while incapacitated, banished, or polymorphed.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Call: Hellfire Imp now summons 2 additional imps.

Transforms your Call: Hellfire Imp into Impcaller.Impcaller (Aura)Your Infernal Strike now summons a Hellfire Imp to aid you in combat for 10 seconds, but its Rage cost is increased by 10.

In addition, the maximum health of your imps is increased by 30%.

Chains of Malice.baseDescription:
Lock an enemy down with magical chains, stunning them and dragging them with you for 5 seconds.

Every 1 sec, the enemy will suffer 16 Physical damage.

Enemies that cannot be stunned or rooted cannot be dragged.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases your critical damage dealt with Physical attacks by 10% and increases the range of Flesh Hook, Chains of Malice, and Chainwhip by 5 yds.
Reduces the cooldown of Chains of Malice by -30 sec, and allows Flesh Hook and Chainwhip to strike up to 2 additional enemies near your primary target.

Chains of Xoroth.baseDescription: Create demonic chains at target location that slow enemies inside by -80% for 5 seconds. At the end of the duration, it pulls all affected enemies to it.

modifyingTalents.description:
Transforms your Flames of Xoroth into Hellfire Bellows.Hellfire BellowsBellow fire on all enemies in a 6 yd cone in front of and behind you, dealing 252 + 17.63% AP + 40% fire SP Fire damage and reducing the cooldown of Chains of Xoroth by 0 to 0 sec per enemy hit.

Cooldown is reduced by -3 sec for each Demonfire consumed.

Chainwhip.baseDescription:
Swing a chain at an enemy dealing 8 + 45% AP + 25% SP Physical damage and silencing them for 2 seconds, generating a large amount of threat.

If you successfully interrupt an enemy, this will refund 20% of the cooldown.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Chainwhip now deals 321 + 30% AP additional Physical damage, increased by 100% on Humanoids.
Increases your critical damage dealt with Physical attacks by 10% and increases the range of Flesh Hook, Chains of Malice, and Chainwhip by 5 yds.
Reduces the cooldown of Chains of Malice by -30 sec, and allows Flesh Hook and Chainwhip to strike up to 2 additional enemies near your primary target.
Casting Flesh Hook or Chainwhip now taunts the target for 2 seconds and reduces your Physical damage taken by -5% for 10 seconds.
Reduces the cooldown of Flesh Hook and Chainwhip by -5 sec.

Cinderblade.baseDescription:
Level 30 Passive
Increases your critical strike rating by 20% of your Intellect and your spell hit chance by 6%.

Conqueror's Will.baseDescription:
Increases the critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, Physical critical strikes now increase the target's Physical damage taken by 4% for 8 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description:
Periodic damage dealt now has a 15% chance to reduce the cooldown of Curse of Xoroth by -3 sec.

Chance to trigger is increased by 2% for each stack of Demonfire active.
Melee Physical damage dealt now generates a stack of Demon's Blood.
Consume all of your Demon's Blood stacks to create a demonic shield that absorbs 860 damage, increased by 20% per Demon's Blood stack, for 30 seconds.
Increases the chance of gaining a stack of Demon's Blood by 25%.
Generating Demon's Blood stacks now generates 1 additional Rage.

Consume all of your Demon's Blood to become a juggernaut, reducing all damage taken by -30% for 10 seconds. 

For the duration, you heal every 3 sec for 6 + 10% AP, increased per Demon's Blood stack consumed.
Each stack of Demon's Blood also increases your Armor by 1%.
Allows Demon's Blood to stack 5 additional times.
Generating a stack of Demon's Blood now has a 15% chance to trigger a fiery explosion on up to 5 nearby enemies, dealing 96 Fire damage.
Your Demon's Blood can now stack 5 additional times and each stack now increases the absorption amount of Black Shield by 1%.
Generating a stack of Demon's Blood now has a 10% chance to unleash your active Pestilence at half of their effectiveness.
Each stack of Demon's Blood now increases the critical strike chance of Sever and Meatsaw by 1%.

Embrace your mortal body, restoring 103 + 10% Stamina health every 3 sec, scaling with Stamina and defense rating.

Lasts 3 sec for each Demonfire consumed.
Increases the duration of Suffuse by 2 sec for each Demonfire consumed.
Periodic damage and healing done has a 10% chance to grant a stack of Demonfire.
Embrace your inner demon, instantly generating 6 stacks of Demonfire and 50 Rage.
Damaging abilities that spend Demonfire now reduces the target's healing received by -20% for 8 seconds.
Grants you a 30% chance to generate a stack of Demonfire when attacked.

Explode with hellish fire, dealing 51 + 25% Strength + 50% fire SP + 10% AP Fire damage to nearby enemies, beckoning Hellfire Imps to aid you in battle for 12 seconds, and generating 30 Rage.

Deals increased damage and increases the amount of imps summoned by 1 for each Demonfire consumed.
Critical strikes with Shieldgore now unleash an eruption of hellfire, causing 111 + 20% AP Fire damage and generating 1 additional Demonfire.
Casting Unleash Pestilence now generates 4 stacks of Demonfire and grants Infernal Bulwark.Infernal Bulwark (Proc)Increases block value by 20% for 18 seconds.

Your Skulltaker and Melt used with 6 Demonfire now refund 2 Demonfire.

Skulltaker used with 6 Demonfire now deals an additional 30% Fire damage.

Transforms your Flames of Xoroth into Hellfire Bellows.Hellfire BellowsBellow fire on all enemies in a 6 yd cone in front of and behind you, dealing 252 + 17.63% AP + 40% fire SP Fire damage and reducing the cooldown of Chains of Xoroth by 0 to 0 sec per enemy hit.

Cooldown is reduced by -3 sec for each Demonfire consumed.

Periodic damage dealt now has a 15% chance to reduce the cooldown of Curse of Xoroth by -3 sec.

Chance to trigger is increased by 2% for each stack of Demonfire active.

Burn an enemy with a fiery strike, dealing 18 + 10% AP + 18% SP Shadowflame Damage, plus an additional 72 + 24% AP + 57.2% SP over 12 seconds.

Deals 20% increased damage per Demonfire consumed.
Increases the critical strike chance of abilities that spend Demonfire by 5%.
When you spend at least 4 Demonfire stacks you now refresh the duration of your Unleash Apocalypse on the target.
Casting Flames of Xoroth with 6 Demonfire now calls down a Rain of Chaos.Rain of ChaosMolten rain burns enemies in the area causing 234 Fire Damage over 9 seconds.
While Hellfire Form is active, your Seeking Flame now has no cooldown and generates an additional Demonfire.
Casting Skulltaker with 6 Demonfire stacks now causes your next Hellmaw within 15 seconds to tick -25% faster and cost -50% less Rage.

Damage dealt by Seeking Flame is increased by 20% on enemies affected by Pestilence of Apocalypse.

Damage dealt is increased by an additional 10% for each Demonfire you have active.

Grants Seeking Flame a 30% chance to generate 1 additional Demonfire when it deals damage.

Chance to trigger is increased by 5% for each Demonfire you have active.

Create a hellstorm, dealing 77 + 32.04% fire SP + 8% AP Fire damage to up to 8 nearby enemies.

Embers then flare every 1 sec for 2 seconds, dealing 28 + 2.5% fire SP + 2.5% AP Fire damage.

Duration is increased by 100% for each stack of Demonfire consumed.

Your Skulltaker used with 6 stacks of Demonfire now reduces the cooldown of Doom by -5 seconds.

In addition, while Doom is active, your Doomguard will now copy your Skulltaker, dealing reduced damage.

Infernal Strike now grants you a stack of Xorothian Fury, increasing the chance for your next Skulltaker within 10 seconds to critically strike by 10% per stack, up to 3 stacks.

Additionally, using Skulltaker with 6 stacks of Demonfire grants you Xorothian Rage, causing your next Infernal Strike within 10 seconds to be guaranteed to critically strike.

Transforms your Flames of Xoroth into Warbringer.WarbringerSlam the ground, dealing 65% Weapon Damage plus 2 to nearby enemies, reducing the effectiveness of any healing by -50% for 10 seconds.

Deals increased damage per Demonfire consumed.

Level 20 Passive
Damaging abilities that spend Demonfire now refresh a charge of Gore.

Ignite your weapon, causing you to send out searing fire with each melee critical strike, dealing 270 + 32.5% AP Fire damage in a line and increasing your Armor penetration by 30% while active. Lasts for 6 attacks.

Lasts for 1 additional attack per Demonfire consumed.
Critical damage taken now grants you 1 Demonfire and 5 Rage. Can only occur once every 3 sec.

Level 30 Passive
Critical strikes with Gore now generate 1 additional Demonfire.
Increases the damage of abilities that spend Demonfire by 25%.
Increases the Weapon Damage dealt by Sever by 10%, increased by 10% for each Demonfire you have active.
Abilities that spend Demonfire now refund 1 Demonfire when used with at least 4 stacks.
When you use an ability that consumes Demonfire with 6 stacks, you now unleash your active Pestilence at half of their effectiveness.

Damaging abilities that spend Demonfire now increase the damage and cost of your next 2 Gores by 25% for 12 seconds.

At the end of the duration, or when all stacks are consumed, you instantly cast Meatsaw free of cost.

Demonfire Plating.baseDescription: Reduces your damage taken by -4% and increases your Stamina by 6%.

Demonic Grit.baseDescription: Grant your summons demonic grit, increasing their total health by 30% and reducing their damage taken by by 20%.

Your Skulltaker used with 6 stacks of Demonfire now reduces the cooldown of Doom by -5 seconds.

In addition, while Doom is active, your Doomguard will now copy your Skulltaker, dealing reduced damage.

Transforms your Greater Imp into a Doomguard for 12 seconds.

While transformed, your Doomguard deals 20% more damage, and its auto attacks ignite the target, dealing 10% of the damage dealt as Fire damage over 6 seconds, stacking 6 times.

Your Skulltaker used with 6 stacks of Demonfire now reduces the cooldown of Doom by -5 seconds.

Melt now increases the damage your target takes from Flames of Xoroth and Skulltaker by 10%.
Your Infernal Strikes against enemies affected by your Flames of Xoroth now blasts nearby enemies for 75 + 10% fire SP + 5% AP Fire damage.

Transforms your Flames of Xoroth into Warbringer.WarbringerSlam the ground, dealing 65% Weapon Damage plus 2 to nearby enemies, reducing the effectiveness of any healing by -50% for 10 seconds.

Deals increased damage per Demonfire consumed.
Increases your critical damage dealt with Physical attacks by 10% and increases the range of Flesh Hook, Chains of Malice, and Chainwhip by 5 yds.
Reduces the cooldown of Chains of Malice by -30 sec, and allows Flesh Hook and Chainwhip to strike up to 2 additional enemies near your primary target.

Forgefiend's Bulwark.baseDescription: Successful blocks, parries and dodges now have a 30% chance to Enrage you, increasing your damage dealt by 10% for 10 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Forgefiend's Bulwark now also increases your critical strike chance by 10%.

Gore.baseDescription:
2 Charges, 8 sec recharge
Generates 1 Demonfire
Quickly gore an enemy, dealing 100% Weapon Damage plus 15.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage of Gore and Sever by 30%.
Damage dealt by Gore and Meatsaw now increases your target's damage taken from Skulltaker and Warbringer by 15% for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times.
Increases the critical strike chance of Gore by 50% and your expertise by 10.

Level 20 Passive
Damaging abilities that spend Demonfire now refresh a charge of Gore.

Level 30 Passive
Critical strikes with Gore now generate 1 additional Demonfire.

Casting Sever now increases your attack speed by 20% for 10 seconds.

Casting Gore extends the duration of this effect by 3 sec.

Gore now heals you for 50% of the damage dealt over 3 sec and grants a stack of Gorged for 30 seconds.

At 3 stacks, your next Sever will consume the stacks to leech an additional 200% of the damage dealt by it from up to 5 enemies within 5 yds.

In addition, Sever now strikes an additional time after 1 sec but has a 2 increased cooldown.

Damaging abilities that spend Demonfire now increase the damage and cost of your next 2 Gores by 25% for 12 seconds.

At the end of the duration, or when all stacks are consumed, you instantly cast Meatsaw free of cost.

Transforms your Greater Imp into a Doomguard for 12 seconds.

While transformed, your Doomguard deals 20% more damage, and its auto attacks ignite the target, dealing 10% of the damage dealt as Fire damage over 6 seconds, stacking 6 times.
Critical strikes with Skulltaker now increases the haste of your Greater Imp by 15% for 8 seconds.
Fire damage dealt by your Greater Imp now has a 25% chance to empower you, increasing your damage dealt by 5% for 10 seconds.

Level 50 Passive
Unleashing a Pestilence now causes your Greater Imp to unleash it's Pestilence.

The Imp's unleash effect is equivalent to your own unleash effect for the equivalent Pestilence.

Hellbringer.baseDescription:
Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

modifyingTalents.description:
Call down a Hellfire Abyssal from the sky to crash down upon the targeted 8 yd area, dealing 1500 + 100% SP + 100% AP Fire damage.

The abyssal remains to aid you in battle for 15 seconds and emits an aura that reduces the damage taken by party and raid members within 40 yds by -5%.

Costs -15 less Rage for each active Hellfire Imp.
Hellmaw causes a Hellfire Explosion at the end of its duration, dealing additional Fire damage to all nearby enemies within 5 yards equal to 50% of the periodic damage dealt over the duration.

Hellfire Form.baseDescription: Enter your Hellfire Form, increasing your Fire damage dealt by 20% and Fire critical strike chance by 15% for 15 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: While Hellfire Form is active, your Seeking Flame now has no cooldown and generates an additional Demonfire.

Level 10 Passive
Successful blocks now have a 30% chance to summon 1 Hellfire Imp to aid you in battle for 12 seconds. Can only occur once every 3 sec.

Generates 2 Demonfire
Beckon 1 Hellfire Imp to aid you in battle for 12 seconds and generate 20 Rage.

Threat generated by Hellfire Imps is transferred to you.

Transforms your Call: Hellfire Imp into Impcaller.Impcaller (Aura)Your Infernal Strike now summons a Hellfire Imp to aid you in combat for 10 seconds, but its Rage cost is increased by 10.

In addition, the maximum health of your imps is increased by 30%.
Each Hellfire Imp active now increases your chance to block by 1%.

Level 20 Passive
Each Hellfire Imp now reduces your Physical damage taken by 1%.

Level 40 Passive
Each Hellfire Imp now reduces your Magic damage taken by 1%.
Each time a Hellfire Imp dies, you reduce the cooldown of Sacrificial Circle by -2 sec and Implosion by -1 sec.

Level 50 Passive
Your successful blocks now have a 30% chance to critically block for twice the normal amount.

Chance to trigger is increased by 2% for each Hellfire Imp you have active.

Call down a Hellfire Abyssal from the sky to crash down upon the targeted 8 yd area, dealing 1500 + 100% SP + 100% AP Fire damage.

The abyssal remains to aid you in battle for 15 seconds and emits an aura that reduces the damage taken by party and raid members within 40 yds by -5%.

Costs -15 less Rage for each active Hellfire Imp.
Increases the Fire damage dealt by your Hellfire Imp by 30% against enemies above 80% maximum health.

Sacrifice your Hellfire Imps within 15 yds, healing you 15% of your maximum health, plus an additional amount equal to 25% of each of your Hellfire Imp's maximum health.

Hellfire Imps sacrificed in this way leave behind corpses.

Generates 2 Demonfire
Beckon 1 Hellfire Imp to aid you in battle for 12 seconds and generate 20 Rage.

Threat generated by Hellfire Imps is transferred to you.

Sacrifice your Hellfire Imps within 15 yds, healing you 15% of your maximum health, plus an additional amount equal to 25% of each of your Hellfire Imp's maximum health.

Hellfire Imps sacrificed in this way leave behind corpses.

Explode with hellish fire, dealing 51 + 25% Strength + 50% fire SP + 10% AP Fire damage to nearby enemies, beckoning Hellfire Imps to aid you in battle for 12 seconds, and generating 30 Rage.

Deals increased damage and increases the amount of imps summoned by 1 for each Demonfire consumed.
Your Hellfire Imps now have a 20% chance on hit to launch a firebolt dealing 40% Strength Fire damage and reducing enemy attack power by 190 for 10 seconds.

Emanate an aura to allies within 25 yds for 15 seconds, increasing their damage dealt by 10%.

Fire damage dealt by Hellfire Imps is increased by 150% and total health increased by 50% while this effect is active on them.

Hellfire Resolve.baseDescription:
Level 30 Passive
Increases your block rating by 15% of your Strength and increases your hit rating by 5% of your Strength.

Hellfire Striker.baseDescription: Increases your critical strike and hit chance by 3%.

Hellknight.baseDescription: While above 75% health, all direct Physical damage dealt will grant a stack of Hellknight.HellknightMovement speed increased and global cooldowns reduced by -5%. Physical Damage and critical strike chance increased by 1%, stacking 5 times. Lasts 20 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Skulltaker with 6 Demonfire stacks now causes your next Hellmaw within 15 seconds to tick -25% faster and cost -50% less Rage.
Seeking Flame now spreads Hellmaw and Melt from the target to up to 3 enemies within 6 yds.
Increases the duration of Hellmaw by 6 sec.
Hellmaw causes a Hellfire Explosion at the end of its duration, dealing additional Fire damage to all nearby enemies within 5 yards equal to 50% of the periodic damage dealt over the duration.
Direct critical strikes now increase the duration of Hellrider on you by 2 sec.

Level 50 Passive
Unleashing a Pestilence now causes your Greater Imp to unleash it's Pestilence.

The Imp's unleash effect is equivalent to your own unleash effect for the equivalent Pestilence.
Reduces the cooldown of Implosion by -10 sec and its Rage cost by -5.
Each time a Hellfire Imp dies, you reduce the cooldown of Sacrificial Circle by -2 sec and Implosion by -1 sec.

Infernal Pursuit.baseDescription: Increases your melee haste by 6% and reduces the duration of root effects against you by -30%.

modifyingTalents.description:

Gore the target with your spiked shield, causing 21 + 35% AP High Threat Fire Damage, scaling with your block value.
Reduces the Rage cost of Infernal Strike, Meatsaw, and Melt by -10.

In addition, the maximum health of your imps is increased by 30%.
Increases your Intellect by 10% and reduces the Rage cost of Infernal Strike by -10.

Infernal Strike now grants you a stack of Xorothian Fury, increasing the chance for your next Skulltaker within 10 seconds to critically strike by 10% per stack, up to 3 stacks.

Additionally, using Skulltaker with 6 stacks of Demonfire grants you Xorothian Rage, causing your next Infernal Strike within 10 seconds to be guaranteed to critically strike.

Level 10 Passive
Doubles the base Weapon Damage dealt by Infernal Strike and increases all critical damage dealt by 25%.
Casting Sever now removes the cost of your next Infernal Strike.
Your Infernal Strikes against enemies affected by your Flames of Xoroth now blasts nearby enemies for 75 + 10% fire SP + 5% AP Fire damage.

Invasion.baseDescription: All Fire damage dealt is increased by 20% to enemies above 80% health.

Jagged Edge.baseDescription: Increases your Rage generated from damage dealt by 20%.

Seeking Flame now spreads Hellmaw and Melt from the target to up to 3 enemies within 6 yds.
Melt now increases the damage your target takes from Flames of Xoroth and Skulltaker by 10%.

Briefly jump atop your Xorothian Warsteed, increasing your movement speed by 70% for 3 seconds.

Usable while indoors, but you cannot use your Mounted Combat abilities while riding your Warsteed in this way.
Reduces the cooldown of all Mounted Combat abilities by -20%.

Can only occur once every 5 sec.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the effectiveness of the unleash effect from Pestilence of Death by 30%.
Increases the effectiveness of your Pestilences by 50%.
Increases the critical damage of your Pestilences by 50%.

Rage of Xoroth.baseDescription: Your critical strikes now enrage you, increasing your melee attack speed by 15%.

Ragefist.baseDescription: Increases your maximum Rage by 20 and reduces the duration of disarm effects against you by -30%.

Your Skulltaker now ignores -25% of the target's Armor.
Your next Skulltaker or Warbringer is guaranteed to critically strike for 25% increased damage. Lasts 30 seconds.
Damage dealt by Stoke the Flames now reduces the cooldown of Sever and Juggernaut by -4 sec.
Casting Suffuse now increases your healing received by 25% for the first 6 seconds of it's duration.
Increases the duration of Suffuse by 2 sec for each Demonfire consumed.
Your Suffuse now increases your movement speed by 20%.

Level 10 Passive
Teaches you Summon: Greater Imp and increases your expertise by 10.
Summon: Greater ImpSummon a Greater Imp to aid you in combat.

Greater Imp has various combat abilities that provide excellent single target damage and control.

Taskmaster.baseDescription: Increases your critical strike chance by 3% plus an additional 15% against Demons.

modifyingTalents.description: Damage dealt by Shieldgore will now apply Torn Flesh, causing the target to bleed for 105 over 15 seconds.
Increases the damage of the Unleash effect of Pestilence of Apocalypse by 25% and its duration is increased by 5 sec.
When you spend at least 4 Demonfire stacks you now refresh the duration of your Unleash Apocalypse on the target.
Casting Unleash Pestilence now removes all active movement impairing effects from you.
While Unleash Pestilence is active it now protects your movement speed from being reduced below 90% of normal speed.
Casting Unleash Pestilence now generates 4 stacks of Demonfire and grants Infernal Bulwark.Infernal Bulwark (Proc)Increases block value by 20% for 18 seconds.
Reduces the cooldown of Unleash Pestilence by -15 sec.

Level 50 Passive
Unleash Pestilence now triggers no cooldown on it's first use.

Unleash Pestilence can only be reset this way once every 30 sec.

War Pig.baseDescription: Increases your Physical damage dealt by 4%.

modifyingTalents.description: Damage dealt by Gore and Meatsaw now increases your target's damage taken from Skulltaker and Warbringer by 15% for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times.
Your next Skulltaker or Warbringer is guaranteed to critically strike for 25% increased damage. Lasts 30 seconds.

2 Charges, 60 sec recharge
Briefly jump atop your Xorothian Warsteed, increasing your movement speed by 70% for 3 seconds.

Usable while indoors, but you cannot use your Mounted Combat abilities while riding your Warsteed in this way.

Xorothian Empowerment.baseDescription: Increases the attack power of all party and raid members 5%. Does not stack with similar effects.

Xorothian Finesse.baseDescription: Increases your chance to parry by 5%.

modifyingTalents.description:
Infernal Strike now grants you a stack of Xorothian Fury, increasing the chance for your next Skulltaker within 10 seconds to critically strike by 10% per stack, up to 3 stacks.

Additionally, using Skulltaker with 6 stacks of Demonfire grants you Xorothian Rage, causing your next Infernal Strike within 10 seconds to be guaranteed to critically strike.

Infernal Strike now grants you a stack of Xorothian Fury, increasing the chance for your next Skulltaker within 10 seconds to critically strike by 10% per stack, up to 3 stacks.

Additionally, using Skulltaker with 6 stacks of Demonfire grants you Xorothian Rage, causing your next Infernal Strike within 10 seconds to be guaranteed to critically strike.

Xorothian Sigil.baseDescription: Create a demonic sigil that protects party members within 20 yds of you, causing them to deflect the next harmful spell cast against them within 3 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description:
2 Charges, 60 sec recharge
Briefly jump atop your Xorothian Warsteed, increasing your movement speed by 70% for 3 seconds.

Usable while indoors, but you cannot use your Mounted Combat abilities while riding your Warsteed in this way.
Your Xorothian Warsteed is now instant cast and prevents roots and slows for 2 sec when cast, but now has a 10 sec cooldown.
